ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/design.md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/design.md
Language: typescript
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/grafana
Language: typescript
The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: labring/sealos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/labring/sealos
Language: typescript
Sealos is an AI-native Cloud Operating System built on Kubernetes that unifies the entire application lifecycle, from development in cloud IDEs to production deployment and management. It is perfect for building and scaling modern AI applications, managed databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB) and complex microservice architectures.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mauriceboe/TREK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK
Language: typescript
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: medusajs/medusa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/medusajs/medusa
Language: typescript
The world's most flexible commerce platform.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nocobase/nocobase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase
Language: typescript
NocoBase is an open-source AI + no-code platform for building business systems fast. Instead of generating everything from scratch, AI works on top of production-proven infrastructure and a WYSIWYG no-code interface, so you get both speed and reliability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nocodb/nocodb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
The Open Context Layer for Data and AI , OpenMetadata is the open platform for building trusted data context and business semantics for humans, AI assistants, and agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca

Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: strapi/strapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/strapi/strapi
Language: typescript
🚀 Strapi is the leading open-source headless CMS. It’s 100% JavaScript/TypeScript, fully customizable, and developer-first.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
Language: typescript
OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.
